hymns.title: Amazing Grace
hymns.author: John Newton
hymns.firstLine: Amazing grace! how sweet the sound,

hymns.title: Holy, Holy, Holy
hymns.author: Reginald Heber
hymns.firstLine: Holy, holy, holy! Lord God Almighty!

hymns.title: A Mighty Fortress Is Our God
hymns.author: Martin Luther
hymns.firstLine: A mighty fortress is our God,

hymns.title: Be Thou My Vision
hymns.author: Irish, attributed to Dallan Forgaill
hymns.firstLine: Be Thou my Vision, O Lord of my heart;

hymns.title: Come Thou Fount of Every Blessing
hymns.author: Robert Robinson
hymns.firstLine: Come, Thou Fount of every blessing,

hymns.title: Rock of Ages
hymns.author: Augustus Toplady
hymns.firstLine: Rock of Ages, cleft for me,

hymns.title: What a Friend We Have in Jesus
hymns.author: Joseph Scriven
hymns.firstLine: What a friend we have in Jesus,

hymns.title: Abide with Me
hymns.author: Henry Francis Lyte
hymns.firstLine: Abide with me; fast falls the eventide;

hymns.title: The Old Rugged Cross
hymns.author: George Bennard
hymns.firstLine: On a hill far away stood an old rugged cross,

hymns.title: Just As I Am
hymns.author: Charlotte Elliott
hymns.firstLine: Just as I am, without one plea,

hymns.title: All Hail the Power of Jesus' Name
hymns.author: Edward Perronet
hymns.firstLine: All hail the power of Jesus' name!

hymns.title: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: When I survey the wondrous cross

hymns.title: O God Our Help in Ages Past
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: O God, our help in ages past,

hymns.title: Fairest Lord Jesus
hymns.author: Anonymous (German, Munster Gesangbuch)
hymns.firstLine: Fairest Lord Jesus, Ruler of all nature,

hymns.title: My Faith Looks Up to Thee
hymns.author: Ray Palmer
hymns.firstLine: My faith looks up to Thee,

hymns.title: Take My Life and Let It Be
hymns.author: Frances Ridley Havergal
hymns.firstLine: Take my life, and let it be

hymns.title: And Can It Be
hymns.author: Charles Wesley
hymns.firstLine: And can it be that I should gain

hymns.title: Trust and Obey
hymns.author: John Henry Sammis
hymns.firstLine: When we walk with the Lord

hymns.title: How Firm a Foundation
hymns.author: "K" in Rippon's Selection of Hymns
hymns.firstLine: How firm a foundation, ye saints of the Lord,

hymns.title: O Worship the King
hymns.author: Robert Grant
hymns.firstLine: O worship the King, all-glorious above,

hymns.title: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty
hymns.author: Joachim Neander
hymns.firstLine: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty, the King of creation!

hymns.title: Guide Me, O Thou Great Jehovah
hymns.author: William Williams
hymns.firstLine: Guide me, O Thou great Jehovah,

hymns.title: My Hope Is Built on Nothing Less
hymns.author: Edward Mote
hymns.firstLine: My hope is built on nothing less

hymns.title: It Is Well with My Soul
hymns.author: Horatio Gates Spafford
hymns.firstLine: When peace, like a river, attendeth my way,

hymns.title: To God Be the Glory
hymns.author: Fanny Crosby
hymns.firstLine: To God be the glory, great things He hath done;

hymns.title: There Is Power in the Blood
hymns.author: Lewis E. Jones
hymns.firstLine: Would you be free from the burden of sin?

hymns.title: Standing on the Promises
hymns.author: R. Kelso Carter
hymns.firstLine: Standing on the promises of Christ my King,

hymns.title: Nothing but the Blood of Jesus
hymns.author: Robert Lowry
hymns.firstLine: What can wash away my sin?

hymns.title: Leaning on the Everlasting Arms
hymns.author: Elisha A. Hoffman
hymns.firstLine: What a fellowship, what a joy divine,

hymns.title: Revive Us Again
hymns.author: William P. Mackay
hymns.firstLine: We praise Thee, O God, for the Son of Thy love,

hymns.title: Sweet Hour of Prayer
hymns.author: William W. Walford
hymns.firstLine: Sweet hour of prayer! Sweet hour of prayer!

hymns.title: Breathe on Me, Breath of God
hymns.author: Edwin Hatch
hymns.firstLine: Breathe on me, Breath of God,

hymns.title: Pass Me Not, O Gentle Saviour
hymns.author: Fanny J. Crosby
hymns.firstLine: Pass me not, O gentle Savior,

hymns.title: Are You Washed in the Blood?
hymns.author: Elisha A. Hoffman
hymns.firstLine: Have you been to Jesus for the cleansing pow'r?

hymns.title: At the Cross
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: Alas! and did my Savior bleed,

hymns.title: The Comforter Has Come
hymns.author: Frank Bottome
hymns.firstLine: O spread the tidings 'round, wherever man is found,

hymns.title: Blessed Be the Name
hymns.author: Charles Wesley
hymns.firstLine: All praise to Him who reigns above

hymns.title: There Shall Be Showers of Blessing
hymns.author: Daniel W. Whittle

hymns.title: Send the Light
hymns.author: Charles H. Gabriel
hymns.firstLine: There's a call comes ringing o'er the restless wave,

hymns.title: Since Jesus Came into My Heart
hymns.author: Rufus H. McDaniel
hymns.firstLine: What a wonderful change in my life has been wrought

hymns.title: 'Tis So Sweet to Trust in Jesus
hymns.author: Louisa M. R. Stead
hymns.firstLine: 'Tis so sweet to trust in Jesus,

hymns.title: In the Garden
hymns.author: C. Austin Miles
hymns.firstLine: I come to the garden alone,

hymns.title: Joy to the World
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: Joy to the world, the Lord is come

hymns.title: Silent Night
hymns.author: Joseph Mohr
hymns.firstLine: Silent night, holy night, All is calm, all is bright Round yon virgin mother and Child

hymns.title: O Come All Ye Faithful
hymns.author: John Francis Wade
hymns.firstLine: O come, all ye faithful, joyful and triumphant, O come ye, O come ye, to Bethlehem

hymns.title: O Little Town of Bethlehem
hymns.author: Phillips Brooks
hymns.firstLine: O little town of Bethlehem, how still we see thee lie

hymns.title: Away in a Manger
hymns.author: Anonymous
hymns.firstLine: Away in a manger, no crib for a bed, The little Lord Jesus laid down His sweet head

hymns.title: Angels We Have Heard on High
hymns.author: Traditional French
hymns.firstLine: Angels we have heard on high Sweetly singing o'er the plains, And the mountains in reply Echoing their joyous strains

hymns.title: The First Noel
hymns.author: Traditional English
hymns.firstLine: The first Noel the angel did say Was to certain poor shepherds in fields as they lay

hymns.title: It Came Upon the Midnight Clear
hymns.author: Edmund Sears
hymns.firstLine: It came upon the midnight clear, That glorious song of old, From angels bending near the earth, To touch their harps of gold

hymns.title: God Rest Ye Merry Gentlemen
hymns.author: Traditional English
hymns.firstLine: God rest ye merry, gentlemen, let nothing you dismay, Remember Christ our Savior was born on Christmas Day

hymns.title: I Heard the Bells on Christmas Day
hymns.author: Henry Wadsworth Longfellow
hymns.firstLine: I heard the bells on Christmas day Their old familiar carols play, And wild and sweet the words repeat Of peace on earth

hymns.title: What Child Is This
hymns.author: William Chatterton Dix
hymns.firstLine: What Child is this who, laid to rest On Mary's lap is sleeping

hymns.title: Christ the Lord Is Risen Today
hymns.author: Charles Wesley
hymns.firstLine: Christ, the Lord, is risen today, Alleluia

hymns.title: Christ Arose (Low in the Grave He Lay)
hymns.author: Robert Lowry
hymns.firstLine: Low in the grave He lay Jesus my Savior

hymns.title: Were You There
hymns.author: Traditional African American Spiritual
hymns.firstLine: Were you there when they crucified my Lord

hymns.title: I Am Jesus' Little Lamb
hymns.author: Henrietta von Hayn
hymns.firstLine: I am Jesus' little lamb, Ever glad at heart I am

hymns.title: Joyful Joyful We Adore Thee
hymns.author: Henry van Dyke
hymns.firstLine: Joyful, joyful, we adore Thee, God of glory, Lord of love

hymns.title: Praise God from Whom All Blessings Flow (Doxology)
hymns.author: Thomas Ken
hymns.firstLine: Praise God, from Whom all blessings flow

hymns.title: Jesus Shall Reign
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: Jesus shall reign where'er the sun Does his suc cessive journeys run

hymns.title: All Creatures of Our God and King
hymns.author: St. Francis of Assisi (tr. William H. Draper)
hymns.firstLine: All creatures of our God and King Lift up your voice and with us sing, O praise Him

hymns.title: For the Beauty of the Earth
hymns.author: Folliot S. Pierpoint
hymns.firstLine: For the beauty of the earth For the glory of the skies, Friends on earth and friends above, For all gentle thoughts and mild

hymns.title: Holy God We Praise Thy Name
hymns.author: Ignaz Franz (tr. Clarence Walworth)
hymns.firstLine: Holy God, we praise Thy Name

hymns.title: O Come O Come Emmanuel
hymns.author: Latin Hymn (tr. John Mason Neale)
hymns.firstLine: O come, O come, Emmanuel, And ransom captive Israel, That mourns in lonely exile here Until the Son of God appear

hymns.title: Now Thank We All Our God
hymns.author: Martin Rinkart (tr. Catherine Winkworth)
hymns.firstLine: Now thank we all our God, with heart and hands and voices, Who wondrous things has done, in Whom this world rejoices

hymns.title: Praise My Soul the King of Heaven
hymns.author: Henry Francis Lyte
hymns.firstLine: Praise, my soul, the King of heaven

hymns.title: Praise the Lord Ye Heavens Adore Him
hymns.author: Edward Osler
hymns.firstLine: Praise the Lord, ye heav'ns, adore Him

hymns.title: Faith of Our Fathers
hymns.author: Frederick William Faber
hymns.firstLine: Faith of our fathers, living still, In spite of dungeon, fire and sword

hymns.title: Saviour Like a Shepherd Lead Us
hymns.author: Dorothy A. Thrupp (attr.)
hymns.firstLine: Savior, like a shepherd lead us, much we need Thy tender care

hymns.title: He Leadeth Me
hymns.author: Joseph Gilmore
hymns.firstLine: He leadeth me, O bless�d thought

hymns.title: Under His Wings
hymns.author: William Cushing
hymns.firstLine: Under His wings I am safely abiding, Though the night deepens and tempests are wild, Still I can trust Him

hymns.title: God Will Take Care of You
hymns.author: Civilla Martin
hymns.firstLine: Be not dismayed whate'er betide, God will take care of you

hymns.title: Rescue the Perishing
hymns.author: Fanny Crosby
hymns.firstLine: Rescue the perishing, care for the dying, Snatch them in pity from sin and the grave

hymns.title: More Love to Thee O Christ
hymns.author: Elizabeth Prentiss
hymns.firstLine: More love to Thee, O Christ

hymns.title: O for a Thousand Tongues to Sing
hymns.author: Charles Wesley
hymns.firstLine: O for a thousand tongues to sing My great Redeemer's praise, The glories of my God and King, The triumphs of His grace

hymns.title: Hark the Voice of Jesus Calling
hymns.author: Daniel March
hymns.firstLine: Hark, the voice of Jesus calling, "Who will go and work today

hymns.title: He Was Not Willing
hymns.author: Lucy R. Meyer
hymns.firstLine: "He was not willing that any should perish"

hymns.title: We Give Thee But Thine Own
hymns.author: William Walsham How
hymns.firstLine: We give Thee but Thine own, Whate'er the gift may be

hymns.title: Let All Mortal Flesh Keep Silence
hymns.author: Liturgy of St. James (tr. Gerard Moultrie)
hymns.firstLine: Let all mortal flesh keep silence, And with fear and trembling stand

hymns.title: 'Twas on That Dark That Doleful Night
hymns.author: Isaac Watts
hymns.firstLine: 'Twas on that dark, that doleful night When pow'rs of earth and hell arose Against the Son of God's delight, And friends betrayed Him to His foes: 6

hymns.title: Be Still My Soul
hymns.author: Katharina von Schlegel (tr. Jane Borthwick)
hymns.firstLine: Be still, my soul: the Lord is on thy side

hymns.title: Come Ye Disconsolate
hymns.author: Thomas Moore (revised by Thomas Hastings)
hymns.firstLine: Come, ye disconsolate, wher'er ye languish

hymns.title: The Church's One Foundation
hymns.author: Samuel John Stone
hymns.firstLine: The Church's one foundation Is Jesus Christ her Lord, She is His new creation By water and the Word

hymns.title: Glorious Things of Thee Are Spoken
hymns.author: John Newton
hymns.firstLine: Glorious things of thee are spoken, Zion city of our God

hymns.title: Beneath the Cross of Jesus
hymns.author: Elizabeth Clephane
hymns.firstLine: Beneath the cross of Jesus I fain would take my stand, The shadow of a mighty rock within a weary land

hymns.title: O Sacred Head Now Wounded
hymns.author: Bernard of Clairvaux (attr., tr. James Alexander)
hymns.firstLine: O sacred Head, now wounded, with grief and shame weighed down, Lo, here I fall, my Savior

hymns.title: Moment by Moment
hymns.author: Daniel Whittle
hymns.firstLine: Dying with Jesus, by death reckoned mine

hymns.title: The God of Abraham Praise
hymns.author: Thomas Olivers
hymns.firstLine: The God of Abr'ham praise, Who reigns enthroned above

hymns.title: The Love of God
hymns.author: Frederick M. Lehman
hymns.firstLine: The love of God is greater far Than tongue or pen can ever tell, It goes beyond the highest star, And reaches to the lowest hell

hymns.title: నీ కృప చాలు
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: నీ కృప చాలు నీ కృప చాలు
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Nee krupa chaalu nee krupa chaalu

hymns.title: సిలువలో నా ప్రభువా
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: సిలువలో నా ప్రభువా నా కొరకై బలియైనావా
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Siluvalo naa prabhuvaa naa korakai baliyainava

hymns.title: यीशु तेरा नाम
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: यीशु तेरा नाम सबसे ऊँचा है
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Yeshu tera naam sabse ooncha hai

hymns.title: प्रभु तेरे हाथों में
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: प्रभु तेरे हाथों में मेरा जीवन है
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Prabhu tere haathon mein mera jeevan hai

hymns.title: तेरी जय हो प्रभु
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: तेरी जय हो प्रभु तेरी जय हो
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Teri jai ho Prabhu teri jai ho

hymns.title: धन्य धन्य हो प्रभु
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: धन्य धन्य हो प्रभु धन्य धन्य हो
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Dhanya dhanya ho Prabhu dhanya dhanya ho

hymns.title: यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: यीशु मसीह तेरा प्यार अनमोल है
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Yeshu Masih tera pyaar anmol hai

hymns.title: प्रभु की स्तुति गाओ
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: प्रभु की स्तुति गाओ सब मिलकर गाओ
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Prabhu ki stuti gaao sab milkar gaao

hymns.title: तेरे बिना प्रभु
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: तेरे बिना प्रभु जी नहीं सकते
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Tere bina Prabhu jee nahin sakte

hymns.title: प्रभु की मेज़ पर
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: प्रभु की मेज़ पर आए हैं हम
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Prabhu ki mez par aaye hain ham

hymns.title: जाओ और सिखाओ
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: जाओ और सिखाओ सब जातियों को
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Jao aur sikhaao sab jaatiyon ko

hymns.title: प्रभु के हाथ में
hymns.author: Traditional
hymns.firstLine: प्रभु के हाथ में हूँ मैं
hymns.firstLineRomanized: Prabhu ke haath mein hoon main
